{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201657004E371FE7199D190CACC9"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7238640247188947716","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然文笔通俗甚至有点流水席的笔法，但贵在真实，职场其实大部分都是平淡的，偶尔有点狗血！很少会出现像穿越剧那样的一步登天[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685377509,"group_id":"7176646670891879427","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzsP8RtQd9/O9BMYycYHYOc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"84261314976","user_name":"杭城大脑虎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"84261314976","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1743827829,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7176646670891879427","book_info":{"abstract":"（职场权谋+商战+职场爱恋+逆袭翻身）在魔都，你想要拥有一个大房子，一辆好车，一个美丽大方的爱人，而你只是个平凡的白领，平凡的会计？怎么办？主角任家铭既是如此，但却凭借着运气，凭借着自身努力，历经着商场上的尔虞我诈，情场上的缘浅缘深，正在一点一点，努力地接近这样的生活……
然而很多事情都没有这么简单。随着任家铭在公司里的地位逐渐上升，任家铭才看清了，从自己面试开始，一切表明上的平静和顺理成章，居然都充满了职场中的权谋之争。让我们随着任家铭的经历，一点一点去体验这其中的职场百态…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obcd2bd68abd665d58b265beac983cec4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"骏小哥","author_id":"","book_id":"7176646670891879427","book_name":"魔都职场风云","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":127,"name":"职场","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=127&name=职场&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7178279157548679717","read_count":"214","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"320004"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"134","tags":"都市日常,都市,职场","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/87329184b1187c862b19b65deb1cb0d9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181020&x-signature=MaujRufqMexMqeaFzhfAghYKnJI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1275879456519672","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.4017589e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201657004E371FE7199D190CACC9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14017,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1632},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7190275997751919372","common":{"comment_type":
